designBrief.silhouette: bulky cargo body, visible hopper and frontal intake — must read as a hauler
forbiddenElements: anything that reads as a combat unit
designBrief.palette: gunmetal with crimson/orange emissive accent strips
designBrief.materialFamily: rolled battle steel, scorched plating, riveted armor
designBrief.rtsReadabilityNotes: Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

promptCandidates: Stylized seamless sci-fi vehicle hull texture sheet for a red faction resource collector / hauler in an alien RTS. Material: rolled battle steel, scorched plating, riveted armor. Palette: gunmetal with crimson/orange emissive accent strips. Alien design language: brutalist, asymmetric reinforcement, battle wear, non-human panel language. Include armor panel lines, subtle wear, faction markings as abstract glyphs. Forbidden: cannons, missile pods, anything that reads as a combat unit. Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

A seamless orthographic PBR texture sheet for a sci-fi resource hauler's hull, presenting a rugged rolled battle steel surface in deep gunmetal grey. The plating is visibly scorched and distressed from heavy use, with areas of heat discoloration fading from charcoal black to rusty brown, emphasizing its arduous journey through alien environments. Robust, large-gauge rivets punctuate the armor seams, securing overlapping panels that show subtle deformation. Integrated into this tough exterior are precisely cut crimson and vibrant orange emissive strips that glow with an internal, subtly pulsating energy, hinting at power flow. Imaginative alien industrial details include embedded, almost organic-looking ventilation grilles that dissipate heat through intricate, fractal-like patterns, and subtle, etched geometric symbols that appear to be part of an ancient alien manufacturing code, all rendered without perspective, baked lighting, or text.

Generate a flat, orthographic, and seamless texture sheet depicting a segment of a sci-fi resource collector's hull, meticulously crafted from heavy-gauge rolled battle steel finished in a dark, formidable gunmetal hue. The surface exhibits extensive scorched plating and abrasive wear, with dark burn marks and scratches revealing layers of resilience, all secured by prominent, meticulously rendered rivets arranged in complex, load-bearing patterns. Crimson and bright orange emissive accent strips run across the surface in precise, angular channels, radiating a steady, intense light that contrasts with the worn metal. Alien industrial details include intricate web-like conduits running just beneath transparent sections of the hull, glowing faintly with internal energy, alongside strange, pressure-sensitive interlocking panels that form hexagonal clusters, and integrated, bioluminescent sensor nodes that emit a soft, pulsating alien light, presented without any perspective, baked lighting, or superimposed text.
